lastRunSummary: Built Game 61: Snake Eyes - Liar's Dice probability duel vs sheriff AI, 51 tests pass.

gameQueue.title: Texas Twister
gameQueue.concept: Physics vortex survival. A tornado bears down on your homestead. Flying debris (planks, barrels, tumbleweeds) spirals around a growing vortex center. Drag and carry essential items (water barrel, medicine box, saddle) from the yard to the storm cellar before the twister arrives. Debris follows curved paths around the vortex and can knock items from your hands. 5 rounds with increasing vortex size and faster spiral debris.
gameQueue.raisesBarOn: First vortex-based radial physics system in series (all objects orbit vortex with angular drift), first drag-to-carry delivery mechanic under live environmental hazards, first game where the playing field itself shrinks as the threat zone expands

gameQueue.title: Iron Horse
gameQueue.concept: Steam locomotive driving puzzle. Manage boiler pressure by shoveling coal on the beat grid while the train accelerates through 5 stations. Too little pressure and you stall; too much and the boiler blows. Brake precisely at each station marker to pick up passengers and supplies — overshoot or undershoot and you lose them. Hazards (rockslides, cattle on the track, broken rails) require split-second speed corrections.
gameQueue.raisesBarOn: First steam locomotive simulation in series, first beat-grid resource management (coal shoveling on rhythm subdivisions), first precision-stop mechanic (brake-to-marker within tolerance), first game combining rhythm-based resource input with spatial stopping precision

runLog.summary: Built Game 61: Snake Eyes - Liar's Dice probability duel vs sheriff AI, 4-personality sheriff, binomial probability display, 51 tests pass.
Built Game 60: Night Herd - isometric stealth defense, Dijkstra dynamic-light pathfinding, dual-threat placement puzzle, 50 tests pass.
Built Game 59: Drought Rider - narrative branching survival, hidden heat accumulation, probability display bars, 40 tests pass.
Built Game 58: Saddlebag - spatial Tetromino packing puzzle, drag-to-preview ghost system, 60 tests pass.
Built Game 57: Canyon Run - pseudo-3D perspective runner, vanishing-point obstacle approach, 3 obstacle types, 65 tests pass.
Built Game 56: Dead Eye - wind-drift shooting gallery, spring-follow crosshair, 3 target types, 58 tests pass.
Added 2s rival grace period at game start (roundStartTimer). Player can orient before rivals engage. 67 tests pass.
Built Game 55: Cattle Baron - turn-based territory strategy, 4x4 parcel grid, 8 threat types, 78 tests pass.
Built Game 54: Smoke Signal - timed smoke pattern generation, hold-duration mechanic, 68 tests pass.
Built Game 53: Dust Bowl Derby - top-down vehicular demolition derby, dual-resource engine heat + body damage, 66 tests pass.
Built Game 52: Frontier Forge - blacksmith 3-phase crafting (heat/strike/quench), material state simulation, 63 tests pass.
Built Game 51: Pinkerton Trail - stealth pursuit tailing, suspicion meter, evidence collection, 47 tests pass.
Built Game 50: Tin Pan Alley - melody-completion piano puzzle, musical phrase-memory mechanic, 47 tests pass.
Built Game 49: Lariat Spin - rotational rope physics, momentum-accumulation + precision-release, 35 tests pass.
Built Game 48: Hangman's Bluff - interrogation deception, lie memory, 3-stage sheriff checkpoint, 37 tests pass.
Built Game 47: Outlaw Auction - hidden-value bounty bidding, 5 behavioral AI rivals, bankroll management, 36 tests pass.
Built Game 46: Prairie Telegraph - semaphore relay chain, 26-letter visual alphabet, hex direct-selector UI, wind gusts, 25 tests pass.
Built Game 45: Rattlesnake Round-Up - multi-phase hold+drag snake wrangling, thermal scope view, 3 snake tiers, 24 tests pass.
Built Game 44: Trail Blaze - player-drawn pathfinding, 5 terrain types, A* comparison, escalating threats, 35 tests pass.
Built Game 43: Wanted: Reward - visual search + composite matching, 4-trait crowd silhouettes, economic payout, 35 tests pass.
